data.name: gdDanhSach_Layout_0.LayoutString
data.value: <GridEXLayoutData><RootTable><AllowAddNew>False</AllowAddNew><Columns Collection="true" ElementName="Column"><Column0 ID="Column1"><BoundMode>UnboundFetch</BoundMode><ColumnType>CheckBox</ColumnType><Key>Column1</Key><Position>0</Position><Width>20</Width><ActAsSelector>True</ActAsSelector></Column0><Column1 ID="clMenu"><ButtonDisplayMode>Always</ButtonDisplayMode><ButtonText>...</ButtonText><ButtonToolTipText>Nhấn để chọn chức năng thực hiện đối với hợp đồng</ButtonToolTipText><ButtonStyle>TextButton</ButtonStyle><BoundMode>UnboundFetch</BoundMode><Key>clMenu</Key><Position>1</Position><Width>20</Width></Column1><Column2 ID="MaHopDong"><Caption>Mã HĐ</Caption><DataMember>MaHopDong</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><Key>MaHopDong</Key><Position>2</Position><Width>70</Width></Column2><Column3 ID="HoTen"><Caption>Họ và tên</Caption><DataMember>HoTen</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><Key>HoTen</Key><Position>3</Position><Width>150</Width></Column3><Column4 ID="NgaySinh"><Caption>Ngày Sinh</Caption><DataMember>NgaySinh</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><Key>NgaySinh</Key><Position>4</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>80</Width></Column4><Column5 ID="NgayNhapMiaCuoiCung"><Caption>Ngày NM cuối</Caption><DataMember>NgayNhapMiaCuoiCung</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><Key>NgayNhapMiaCuoiCung</Key><Position>5</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>80</Width></Column5><Column6 ID="Ten_Thon"><Caption>Thôn</Caption><DataMember>Ten_Thon</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><HideWhenGrouped>True</HideWhenGrouped><Key>Ten_Thon</Key><Position>6</Position><Width>102</Width></Column6><Column7 ID="Ten_Xa"><Caption>Xã</Caption><DataMember>Ten_Xa</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><HideWhenGrouped>True</HideWhenGrouped><Key>Ten_Xa</Key><Position>7</Position><Width>102</Width></Column7><Column8 ID="HopDongID"><Caption>HopDongID</Caption><DataMember>HopDongID</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><Key>HopDongID</Key><Position>8</Position><Visible>False</Visible></Column8><Column9 ID="NgayTinhCongNo"><Caption>Ngày tính công nợ</Caption><DataMember>NgayTinhCongNo</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><Key>NgayTinhCongNo</Key><Position>9</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>92</Width></Column9><Column10 ID="NhapTienTraNo"><Caption>Nhập tiền trả nợ</Caption><InputMask>General</InputMask><Key>NhapTienTraNo</Key><MaxLength>10</MaxLength><NullText>0</NullText><Position>10</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>120</Width></Column10><Column11 ID="TienTraNo"><Caption>TT trả nợ</Caption><DataMember>TienTraNo</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString># ### ### ###</FormatString><Key>TienTraNo</Key><Position>11</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>120</Width></Column11><Column12 ID="Column2"><Caption>TT phải trả</Caption><DataMember>TongPhaiTra</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString># ### ### ###</FormatString><Key>Column2</Key><Position>12</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>120</Width></Column12><Column13 ID="Column3"><Caption>TT thu được</Caption><DataMember>TongThuDuoc</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString># ### ### về</Caption><DataMember>TongLayVe</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString># ### ### ###</FormatString><Key>Column4</Key><Position>14</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>120</Width></Column14><Column15 ID="TongNoLai"><Caption>TT nợ lại</Caption><DataMember>TongNoLai</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString># ### ### ###</FormatString><Key>TongNoLai</Key><Position>15</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>120</Width></Column15></Columns><AllowDelete>False</AllowDelete><AllowEdit>True</AllowEdit><GroupCondition /><Groups Collection="true" ElementName="Group"><Group0 ID="Group0"><ColIndex>7</ColIndex><GroupPrefix /><AllowRemove>False</AllowRemove></Group0><Group1 ID="Group1"><ColIndex>6</ColIndex><GroupPrefix /><AllowRemove>False</AllowRemove></Group1></Groups><RowHeight>25</RowHeight><TotalRow>True</TotalRow><RowFormatStyle><BackColorAlphaMode>Opaque</BackColorAlphaMode></RowFormatStyle></RootTable><SearchColumnIndex>9</SearchColumnIndex><DropDowns Collection="true" ElementName="DropDown"><DropDown0 ID="ddlDanhMucDauTu"><RootTable><Columns Collection="true" ElementName="Column"><Column0 style=Bold</Font><VisualStyle>Standard</VisualStyle><AllowEdit>False</AllowEdit><AutomaticSort>False</AutomaticSort><FrozenColumns>10</FrozenColumns><GroupByBoxVisible>False</GroupByBoxVisible><TotalRow>True</TotalRow><EnterKeyBehavior>NextCell</EnterKeyBehavior><BuiltInTexts
